subcodes.first_line: O Afnan of the Divine Tree! Your letter was received and carefully studied. This house, which now [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنان شجره رحمانیه نامه شما رسید و بدقت مطالعه گردید این خانه که الان
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @House of Justice
